Interface EconomyAPI

All Known Implementing Classes:
EconomyService
public interface EconomyAPI
The public, cross-plugin contract for the Sylphian economy, obtained via EconomyProvider.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    deposit(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
    Adds money to a player (e.g.
    CompletableFuture<BigDecimal>
    getBalance(UUID uuid)
    Reads a player's balance.
    CompletableFuture<Boolean>
    has(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
    Checks whether a player can afford an amount.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    set(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
    Overwrites a player's balance (administrative use).

    transfer(UUID from, UUID to, BigDecimal amount)
    Moves money from one player to another, all-or-nothing.

    withdraw(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
    Removes money from a player if they can afford it (e.g.

  • Method Details

    • getBalance

      CompletableFuture<BigDecimal> getBalance(UUID uuid)
      Reads a player's balance.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      a future of the current balance (zero if the player has no account yet)

    • has

      CompletableFuture<Boolean> has(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
      Checks whether a player can afford an amount.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      amount - the amount to test against
      Returns:
      a future of true if the balance is greater than or equal to amount

    • deposit

      CompletableFuture<Void> deposit(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
      Adds money to a player (e.g. a quest reward or crate payout).
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      amount - a positive amount
      Returns:
      a future that completes when applied

    • withdraw

      CompletableFuture<Boolean> withdraw(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
      Removes money from a player if they can afford it (e.g. a shop purchase).
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      amount - a positive amount
      Returns:
      a future of true if charged, false if funds were insufficient

    • transfer

      CompletableFuture<Boolean> transfer(UUID from, UUID to, BigDecimal amount)
      Moves money from one player to another, all-or-nothing.
      Parameters:
      from - the paying player's UUID
      to - the receiving player's UUID
      amount - a positive amount
      Returns:
      a future of true if transferred, false if the payer could not afford it

    • set

      CompletableFuture<Void> set(UUID uuid, BigDecimal amount)
      Overwrites a player's balance (administrative use).
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      amount - the new balance (non-negative)
      Returns:
      a future that completes when set
